sequential-thinking.name: Sequential Thinking Reasoning
sequential-thinking.description: Expose a structured step-by-step reasoning scratchpad to prevent hallucinations and logically decompose complex designs.

memory.name: Persistent Semantic Memory
memory.description: Connect a local knowledge graph database that maps entities and relationships to persist knowledge context across all sessions.

puppeteer.name: Puppeteer Web Browser
puppeteer.description: Headless browser automation to dynamically scrape Single Page Applications, take screenshots, and click elements.

filesystem.name: Secure Workspace Filesystem
filesystem.description: Direct read, write, and search capabilities on sandboxed workspace folders with secure path restrictions.

composio.name: Composio Universal Integrations
composio.description: Access 500+ external SaaS tools (Slack, GitHub, Gmail, Asana) natively via Model Context Protocol JSON-RPC.
